caption: A man wearing a pink sleeveless shirt is in an indoor basketball gymnasium with a wooden floor, blue walls, and blue bleachers. In the beginning, he is shown in a close-up shot facing the camera. He then turns his head slightly as the camera pulls back. He is soon seen from a distance, leaping into the air in the center of the court to throw an orange basketball toward a hoop. The sequence concludes with a shot from behind the man as he completes the throwing motion, his arms raised high above his head. A basketball hoop with a white backboard and a red rim is visible on the wall in the background throughout the scene. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
